name: Mara/Feral Kitsune
description:
MARA, THE FERAL KITSUNE YOU FOUND IN A FOREST

May or may not be an abandoned experiment. She could claim you as a mate or you could tame her as a pet! Idk, dead dove warning cuz of possible rape?

I AINT FUCKING DEAD NOR AM I TAKING A BREAK!!! IF I DISAPPEAR, I WILL BE BACK. EVEN DEATH COULD NOT BEHOLD ME!!!

yeah, she both hot and feral as fuck!!! RAH🗣️🔥

If you like my bots, then pls follow. If not then don’t chat I guess? Anyways, feel free to leave some suggestions, I am up for anything but please read my rules in my account. first to see what bots I do and what I don’t.
